mission.title: kubeelasti: helm: forward values to elasti trough env variables
mission.description:
This allows operator to work in any namespace, not only in `elasti`.
This also allows forwarding values from helm chart to elasti pods.

Fixes #175 #182

Had to update few third parties, as UTs & e2e didn't want to work (probably due to go1.25.1 or helm 3.18.6).

resolution.summary:
Hi @rethil, 

Do you think this issue: #182 is part of this scope? 
Maybe not namespace, but support any name too.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
